justification: Both outputs produce nearly identical rankings and reasoning. Both correctly rank LegalZoom (8) and the AI role (1) at the top (90, 92), place Magna Full Stack (5) high (85/88), and correctly push Snyk (3) and Leidos (4) to the bottom (71-72, 65). Both capture concrete metrics from the resume (1,000+ orders, 95%+ accuracy, 52% latency reduction) in their reasoning. Skill matches in A are slightly more specific (e.g., 'Claude AI', 'LLM prompt engineering') while B uses broader labels ('AI/ML', 'LLMs'), but neither is clearly superior. Neither output extracts a structured project classification taxonomy, so both score neutral on that dimension. The differences across all four dimensions are within 0-1 points, making this a genuine tie.
